response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify band introductions, song performances, and outro talk. 2. Identified the song title 'Caramel Pain' from on-screen text during the performance. 3. Identified the composer as 'Deu' from the on-screen credit. 4. Performed a web search for 'Caramel Pain Deu lyrics'. 5. Found the full lyrics, original artist, and an English translation. 6. Segmented the video into three distinct scenes based on content and audio. 7. Constructed the JSON response using the collected metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a band performance by VTubers Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei, performing the song 'Caramel Pain' composed by Deu. The video begins with a band introduction, followed by the main performance, and concludes with an outro segment involving conversation.

scenes.description: The video opens with a sequence introducing the band members: 'Drums: Gento Shirakawa', 'Bass: Yu Park', 'Guitar: Yoshihiko Haga', and 'Manipulator: hana'. No vocal music is playing.
Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song 'Caramel Pain'. The song title and credits appear on screen. The performers sing and dance throughout the scene.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I never seem to have the courage to put myself first
I won't realize unless I've been hurt first
Don't expect me to be a goody-two-shoes
When the world comes in all shapes, sizes, and flavors
Too sweet, too bitter - my head's about to splinter
All I do is wade through it in a daze 24/7
I've had it, can't hold my emotions down
Can't live my life like this, it'd be a letdown
Scary as it is
I'll leave it behind
I'll leave it all behind
My ideologies, my way or the highway
They may break, but I like the way it is
'Cause I wanna be who I am forever
The route? The mood? Who cares? To the next we go
'Cause who dares wins, right?
If sacrifices must be made, they will be
From my bed I rise holding on to my hurt alone
Ah, so I'm in Caramel Pain again
Layer it and hide it like a mille-feuille
But it'll fall away, it'll all fall apart
If I'd told you about all my hurt
Would things have been different, a better start?
The anime I love go away
Even the people I love go away
It's all so, so sad
But there's only one thing that matters
Leave no stone unturned, have no regrets
Live life with my head held high, as good as it gets
I'll leave it behind
I'll leave it all behind
My ideologies, my way or the highway
They may get stained, but I'll take it the way it is
'Cause I wanna be in love with myself forever
I love you, I love you all the way
Saying goodbye brings out the tears
If sacrifices must be made, they will be
From my bed I rise holding on to my hurt alone
Ah, so I'm in Caramel Pain again
I never seem to have the courage to put myself first
I can deal with a little hurt
And so I'm in Caramel Pain again

scenes.description: The video concludes with an outro segment where the performers talk to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
